transcript: I ain't paying you at all-- '[beep]' --friend, 'cause I didn't order any putty. I got no use for putty, I'm not even workin', I don't do nothin', what the hell would I do with putty?
Well, if you're gonna take that attitude, I might as well just make putty outta your face, how's that sound?
Well, you can try it, friend! I'm an ex-policeman, and if you want to do it, you just come over here and try it any time you want.
Uh, I'll... I'll succeed, I won't-- [beep] --try.
I don't think you'll succeed, horse's ass.
I think I'll make bird feathers outta your face, how's that sound?
Anything you wanna try, you just try it.
How 'bout I try some back kicks upside your lip?
Well, you can go right ahead ahead and try, and I'll put a thirty-eight-- '[beep]' --through your eyeball, too.
I don't think you even got that kind of caliber.
I... I got about sixty calibers in my fist alone.
Well, I don't give a damn what you've got in your fists. Why don't you get off the phone?
